_note: Stone-archway overhead obstacle. Sprite placed at GROUND_Y=470 with origin(0.5,1). Hitbox band covers the zone a standing dragon (body top at GROUND_Y-34=436) occupies that a ducked dragon (body top at GROUND_Y-18=452) clears.

hitboxBand._note: In screen coords: Y=[436,452] (GROUND_Y-34 to GROUND_Y-18). Phase 5 applies: body.setSize(192,16); body.setOffset(0, height-18-16) per actual canvas.

postProcessing: flood-fill transparency: exterior corners (tolerance 40) + interior passage (teal glow, tolerance 45). Final transparency: 57.7%. Ember-red keystone preserved at apex center (96,64), 30x29px.
